name: dk_acc
drl:
rule R1 when accumulate( T(w == 1, $x : v); $s : sum($x) ) then end
rule R2 when accumulate( T(w == 1, $x : v); $m : min($x) ) then end
rule R3 when accumulate( T(w == 9, $x : v); $s : sum($x) ) then end
rule R4 when accumulate( T(w == 9, $x : v); $m : max($x) ) then end
rule R5 when accumulate( T(w == 1, $x : v); $c : count($x) ) then end
